# TripoSplat Viewer Vendor Assets

These browser assets are bundled locally so the Manager-facing TripoSplat UI can run without CDN access:

- `three.module.js` and `three.core.js` from Three.js 0.180.0, MIT license.
- `three-addons/controls/OrbitControls.js` from Three.js 0.180.0, MIT license.
- `spark.module.js` from `@sparkjsdev/spark` 2.0.0, MIT license.
- `lucide-0.468.0.min.js` from Lucide 0.468.0, ISC license.

The TripoSplat Manager UI uses Spark for Gaussian splat preview only. Mesh export is not implemented in this module.
